stemHtml: What is an example of poor performance due to human overload?

options.a: A missed radio call on a regularly flown route in perfect weather during a low-workload period of flight.
options.b: Damaging the aircraft in a forced landing following a low-altitude double engine failure.
options.c: Forgetting to monitor the fuel level during an emergency situation with high workload.
options.d: A bad landing on a VFR day.
